docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN HOLMS, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-26-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN HOLMS, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT PETER GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DEFENDANT PETER GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
